Size Our mugs are designed with a comfortable height and diameter, ensuring a cozy grip for your sipping pleasure. Enjoy your favorite beverages with ease and comfort. Height : 9.7cm Diameter : 8.2cm Variety of Infill Colours Sip in style with our mugs featuring a vibrant array of infill colors, adding a splash of personality to your daily routine. Choose your hue and make a colorful statement with every sip. High Quality Print Immerse yourself in impeccable quality with our print mugs, boasting stunning designs that captivate with their vibrant precision and lasting beauty. Microwave Safe Experience hassle-free heating with our microwave-safe mugs, combining convenience and style for quick and easy warmth. Glossy Finish Elevate your sipping experience with our glossy finish mugs, offering a touch of sophistication and a sleek, lustrous shine. Come with White Gift Box Enhance the gifting experience with our mugs, packaged in a sleek white gift box for a touch of elegance and convenience. Is this mug dishwasher safe? Yes, it is dishwasher safe but magic mug in not dishwasher safe. How is the product quality? Product quality is really nice & it comes with high quality print. What is the capacity of mug? The capacity of mug is 330ml. Can we use mug in the microwave? Yes, our mug's are safe to put in the microwave. How is the product package quality? The product is packed in a extra strong smash-proof box.
